channel.title: CompTIA A+ on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in CompTIA A+ on simeononsecurity

item.title: CompTIA A+ (220-1201): Hardware and Network Troubleshooting
item.category: "CompTIA A+ Course" , "Troubleshooting" , "Hardware Diagnostics" , "Network Troubleshooting" , "IT Support" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Help Desk" , "Computer Hardware" , "Diagnostics" , "IT Fundamentals"
item.description: Master hardware and network troubleshooting for the CompTIA A+ 220-1201 Core 1 exam. Diagnose motherboards, RAM, CPUs, power, drives, displays, mobile devices, printers, and networks.

item.title: CompTIA A+ (220-1201): Hardware Components
item.category: "CompTIA A+ Course" , "Computer Hardware" , "Motherboards" , "CPU" , "Storage" , "IT Support" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Help Desk" , "Hardware Fundamentals" , "PC Building"
item.description: Master hardware for the CompTIA A+ 220-1201 Core 1 exam. Learn cables and connectors, RAM, storage devices, motherboards and CPUs, power supplies, and printers.

item.title: CompTIA A+ (220-1201): Mobile Devices
item.category: "CompTIA A+ Course" , "Mobile Devices" , "Laptops" , "Hardware Fundamentals" , "IT Support" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Help Desk" , "Smartphones" , "Tablets" , "Computer Hardware"
item.description: Master mobile devices for the CompTIA A+ 220-1201 Core 1 exam. Learn laptop hardware, accessories and connectivity, network connectivity, MDM, and mobile synchronization.

item.title: CompTIA A+ (220-1201): Networking Fundamentals
item.category: "CompTIA A+ Course" , "Networking" , "TCP/IP" , "Wireless Networking" , "IT Support" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Help Desk" , "Network Hardware" , "SOHO Networks" , "IT Fundamentals"
item.description: Master networking for the CompTIA A+ 220-1201 Core 1 exam. Learn TCP and UDP ports, wireless technologies, networked host services, network hardware, SOHO configuration, and tools.

item.title: CompTIA A+ (220-1201): Virtualization and Cloud Computing
item.category: "CompTIA A+ Course" , "Virtualization" , "Cloud Computing" , "Hypervisors" , "IT Support" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Help Desk" , "Containers" , "VDI" , "IT Fundamentals"
item.description: Master virtualization and cloud computing for the CompTIA A+ 220-1201 Core 1 exam. Learn virtual machines, hypervisors, VDI, containers, cloud models, and cloud characteristics.

item.title: CompTIA A+ (220-1202): Operating Systems
item.category: "CompTIA A+ Course" , "Operating Systems" , "Windows Administration" , "Linux" , "macOS" , "IT Support" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Help Desk" , "Command Line" , "IT Fundamentals"
item.description: Master operating systems for the CompTIA A+ 220-1202 Core 2 exam. Learn OS types, installations, Windows editions, tools, command line, settings, networking, macOS, and Linux.

item.title: CompTIA A+ (220-1202): Operational Procedures
item.category: "CompTIA A+ Course" , "Operational Procedures" , "Documentation" , "Change Management" , "Backups" , "IT Support" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Help Desk" , "Professionalism" , "IT Fundamentals"
item.description: Master operational procedures for the CompTIA A+ 220-1202 Core 2 exam. Learn documentation, change management, backups, safety, environmental controls, communication, scripting, and AI basics.

item.title: CompTIA A+ (220-1202): Security
item.category: "CompTIA A+ Course" , "Security" , "Malware" , "Wireless Security" , "Windows Security" , "IT Support" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Help Desk" , "Social Engineering" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master security for the CompTIA A+ 220-1202 Core 2 exam. Learn physical and logical security, Windows security settings, wireless protocols, malware, social engineering, and hardening.

item.title: CompTIA A+ (220-1202): Software Troubleshooting
item.category: "CompTIA A+ Course" , "Software Troubleshooting" , "Malware Removal" , "Windows" , "Mobile OS" , "IT Support" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Help Desk" , "Diagnostics" , "IT Fundamentals"
item.description: Master software troubleshooting for the CompTIA A+ 220-1202 Core 2 exam. Diagnose Windows OS issues, mobile OS and application problems, security symptoms, and malware removal.

item.title: CompTIA A+ Course: Complete Study Guide for the 220-1201 and 220-1202 Exams
item.category: "CompTIA A+ Course" , "IT Certification" , "Hardware Fundamentals" , "Operating Systems" , "Network Troubleshooting" , "CompTIA Certification" , "IT Support" , "Help Desk" , "Computer Hardware" , "Windows Administration"
item.description: A comprehensive CompTIA A+ study course covering all exam objectives for the 220-1201 Core 1 and 220-1202 Core 2 exams. Learn hardware, networking, operating systems, security, and troubleshooting.

item.title: Tips for Passing CompTIA Exams in 2026: Your Complete Strategy Guide
item.category: "CompTIA exams" , "IT certification" , "study plan" , "practice exams" , "performance-based questions" , "exam objectives" , "IT professionals" , "test-taking tips" , "study resources" , "time management" , "exam format" , "eliminating wrong answers" , "answering techniques" , "reading comprehension" , "critical thinking" , "test anxiety" , "confidence building" , "exam preparation" , "information technology" , "career advancement" , "passing CompTIA exams" , "tips for CompTIA exams" , "CompTIA exam guide" , "exam success strategies" , "CompTIA study tips" , "exam preparation techniques" , "CompTIA certification" , "passing IT exams" , "study resources for CompTIA exams" , "time management for exams" , "test-taking strategies" , "IT career advancement" , "Security Plus" , "Network Plus" , "A Plus" , "CompTIA A+" , "CompTIA Security+" , "CompTIA Network+" , "CompTIA CySA+" , "CompTIA PenTest+" , "CompTIA Cloud+" , "2026 exam tips" , "certification success" , "exam strategies" , "study methods" , "practice questions" , "exam simulation" , "certification path" , "IT certification guide" , "exam costs" , "study timeline" , "exam objectives" , "hands-on labs"
item.description: Get all the tips, tricks, and strategies you need to pass CompTIA exams in 2026, including updated exam formats, pricing, study resources, and proven test-taking techniques.
